compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Defend against LangChain churn and silent structured-output failures.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Built on create_agent v1; exact-pin langgraph/-prebuilt/-checkpoint (upgrades gated behind WS-G evals).
- [ ] Pydantic v2 (all fields required), include_raw=True, branch on parsing_error/parsed-is-None with own retry+repair; non-empty invalid_tool_calls retryable.
- [ ] Preserve AIMessage(tool_calls)<->ToolMessage pairing across WORKFLOW_STEP replay.
Files: src/rebar/llm/runner.py, src/rebar/llm/config.py, pyproject.toml
compiled_state.title: WS-D4: Agent runtime hardening (pins + robust structured output)
